title: becium formosum
intro: Becium formosum, also known as Wild Basil or Lippia, is a perennial herb native to Africa, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It possesses medicinal properties due to its essential oils, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Becium formosum include reducing stress, improving digestion, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, it is prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil for medicinal purposes, and is also used as a flavoring agent in food and beverages.
